_comment: SoftwareApplication Schema — inject each tool's block as a <script type='application/ld+json'> at the bottom of its corresponding tool page HTML.

loan-payment-calculator.name: Loan Payment Calculator
loan-payment-calculator.description: Free online loan payment calculator. Calculate monthly payment, total interest, and total cost for any loan using the standard amortization formula.

credit-card-interest-calculator.name: Credit Card Interest Calculator
credit-card-interest-calculator.description: Calculate your monthly credit card interest charge, how much of your payment reduces principal, and how many months to pay off your balance.

compound-interest-calculator.name: Compound Interest Calculator
compound-interest-calculator.description: Calculate how an investment grows with compound interest using the formula A = P(1 + r/n)^(nt). Supports annual, monthly, and daily compounding.

salary-to-hourly-converter.name: Salary to Hourly Converter
salary-to-hourly-converter.description: Convert any annual salary to hourly, daily, weekly, and monthly pay. Customizable hours per week and weeks per year.

tip-calculator.name: Tip Calculator
tip-calculator.description: Calculate tip amount by percentage, see total bill including tip, and split evenly among any number of people.

percentage-calculator.name: Percentage Calculator
percentage-calculator.description: Solve three types of percentage problems: find X% of Y, find what % X is of Y, and calculate % change between two values.

discount-calculator.name: Discount Calculator
discount-calculator.description: Calculate final price, total savings, and discount amount from any original price and percentage off.

fuel-cost-calculator.name: Fuel Cost Calculator
fuel-cost-calculator.description: Estimate total gas cost for any trip using distance (miles), fuel efficiency (MPG), and current gas price per gallon.

mortgage-calculator.name: Mortgage Calculator
mortgage-calculator.description: Free mortgage calculator with full PITI breakdown (principal, interest, taxes, insurance), PMI, HOA fees, extra payments, equity growth tracking, and refinancing analysis.

unit-converter.name: Unit Converter
unit-converter.description: Free online unit converter: length, weight, temperature, speed, volume, area, cooking, data storage, and pressure. Instant results, no sign-up required.
